name: aws-sso-profiles
title: AWS SSO Profiles
description: Quickly switch between AWS SSO accounts by opening them in the browser
author: patrick-werz

commands.name: list-profiles
commands.title: List AWS SSO Profiles
commands.description: Browse and open your AWS SSO accounts in the browser

preferences.name: awsConfigPath
preferences.title: AWS Config File Path
preferences.description: Path to your AWS config file (defaults to ~/.aws/config)

preferences.name: additionalRegions
preferences.title: Additional Regions
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of extra regions to show for each role (e.g., 'us-east-2, us-west-2'). Roles will be listed once per region.

preferences.name: showUsageCount
preferences.title: Show Usage Count
preferences.description: Display how many times each account and role has been opened
preferences.label: Show usage count badges
